title: Terms and conditions
seoDescription: Informational terms and conditions of Instal Berrozpe for using the website and requesting quotes.
intro: These terms govern the informational use of the website and the sending of contact or quote requests.

sections.heading: Purpose of the website
body: The website is for information purposes and acts as a contact channel to learn about Instal Berrozpe services.
The information published does not by itself constitute a binding offer or an automatic contracting of services.

sections.heading: Requests and quotes
body: Each enquiry, quote or job must be confirmed individually between Instal Berrozpe and the interested person.
Timing, technical conditions, availability and price will be specified according to the type of work requested.

sections.heading: Liability and external links
body: Instal Berrozpe will aim to keep website information clear and up to date, but may change it whenever necessary.
The website may include external links for information purposes. Instal Berrozpe does not assume direct responsibility for content or services outside its own domain.
Any issue related to this website will be interpreted in accordance with applicable law.
